description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow has three jobs: tests, pre-commit, and check-package. The tests job runs on multiple Python versions (3.9 to 3.13) on ubuntu, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, runs pytest with coverage, and uploads the coverage to Codecov. The pre-commit job runs on ubuntu-latest and executes pre-commit hooks. The check-package job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, and builds and inspects the Python package.
